plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-350 RP11.P04.M06.S06-RP11.P05.M05.S07 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-350 implements descriptor-only coverage that closes the RP11.P04 UI phase (M06 synthetic fixture tail, M07 test/golden, M08 Hermes evidence, M09 Claude review 20-row cycles, M10 closeout 8-row head) and opens the RP11.P05 fixture foundation (M00-M05: base tenant/user/matter/document fixtures, golden/review/denied/cross-tenant/missing-context cases, audit hint cases, security trimming cases, AI retrieval or analytics cases, fixture manifests, golden/failure tests, Hermes fixture evidence, Claude missing-test prompts, no-real-data checks) across eleven sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H11), Claude review packet (C11), and CP00-351 handoff, without opening fixture runtime loading or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-350 is a genuine, plan-aligned, descriptor-only closeout pack (150 units, RP11.P04.M06.S06-RP11.P05.M05.S07, risk C). Coverage and distribution are consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, the registry binding, the contract current_pack, and the validator drift checks (deliverable counts claude_review 14/ui 34/security_audit 12/implementation 34/fixture 40/test 10/hermes_evidence 6; phases P04 83 + P05 67 = 150). Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced: freezeCp350Result forces all runtime/write/leak flags false after the spread, and validateTimeExpenseCoreCp350P04CloseoutP05FixtureFoundationDescriptor checks descriptor_only, no runtime execution, customer-safe errors, no raw payload, cross-tenant denial, and no-real-data, mirrored by the manifest implementation_summary attestations. The authority boundary holds (claude_is_final_approval false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation true, human final approval required); Hermes is used only as a deterministic evidence/receipt descriptor (H11) with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false. The pack-level claim is correctly scoped as production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review with production_ready_candidate=true, not an enterprise-trust claim. Readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-zero JSON, forbidden_review_evidence enumerates all hardening blockers, and tests plus 23 zero-exit validation commands support the gates. No production_ready over-claim, no boundary violation, and no read-only/authority breach detected. No findings.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-350 time expense core p04 closeout p05 fixture foundation descriptor pack
